title: X by Xreal is the first affordable pair of smart glasses that don't feel like a compromise
summary: X by Xreal redefines affordable smart display glasses with a brilliant modular design, stunning eye-friendly micro-OLED panels, and impressive spatial tracking.
imageAlt: X by Xreal is the first affordable pair of smart glasses that don't feel like a compromise

multimedia.caption: (Image credit: © Nicholas Sutrich / Android Central)

fullArticle:
Xreal's first pair of budget smart display glasses impresses in every way. With ground-breaking modular construction, 3D-printing template files, multiple official shades and styles to choose from, and the lightest frames on the market, these are incredibly comfortable to wear.
The SeeYa micro-OLED panels are not only the smart glasses industry's first native 10-bit displays but also feature impressive 3840Hz PWM dimming for incredible eye comfort. These are also the first pair of affordable wearable displays with spatial tracking, further adding value to the package. The speakers could be louder, but they do sound great and are one of the only middling aspects of an otherwise truly stellar pair of glasses.

Native 10-bit HDR modes and AI SDR-to-HDR conversion
